THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 517 FILLMORE ST, S.F. $1,565.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED TILL MIDNIGHT 5/31/97. KEYS TO BE RETURNED ON OR BEFORE 5PM 5/31/97. ANY PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED CLAIMS ARE WAIVED BY PARTIES. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT DECLARED FORFEITED.
